home.title: Free, browser-based PDF editor. No sign-up, 100% local.
home.description: Free online PDF editor that runs 100% in your browser. Add text, draw, sign and download — your file never leaves your device.

merge.title: Merge PDF files online free — InksPDF
merge.description: Combine multiple PDFs into one file, in any order, entirely in your browser. No upload, no signup, no file size limit.
merge.schemaDescription: Combine multiple PDF files into one document, in any order, entirely in your browser, with no upload and no file size limit.
featureList: Combine unlimited PDF files into one document
Reorder files by dragging before merging
Runs entirely in the browser — files are never uploaded

split.title: Split & extract PDF pages online free — InksPDF
split.description: Pull specific pages out of a PDF or split it into separate files, entirely in your browser. No upload, no signup.
split.schemaDescription: Extract specific pages from a PDF or split it into multiple separate files, entirely in your browser.
featureList: Extract specific pages or page ranges
Split one PDF into multiple separate files

watermark.title: Add watermark & page numbers to a PDF — InksPDF
watermark.description: Stamp a text watermark and page numbers across every page of a PDF, entirely in your browser. No upload, no signup.
watermark.schemaDescription: Stamp a custom text watermark and add page numbers across every page of a PDF, entirely in your browser.
featureList: Custom text watermark with adjustable color, size and opacity
Add page numbers in a choice of positions
Applies to every page of the PDF in one pass

privacy.title: Privacy Policy — InksPDF
privacy.description: How InksPDF handles (or rather, never handles) your files and data.
